old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-6uyi","title":"Compose public secure RPL stack","description":"After durable-state fail-closed changes, Stack is private but every public RplStack constructor requires Stack\u003cR\u003e, making RplStack externally unconstructible. Re-exporting Stack would reopen raw/plaintext CoAP paths through Stack and RplStack::send_ipv6_raw. Design one constructible production owner that combines RPL routing and SecureStack while preventing plaintext CoAP. This blocks claiming the converged public runtime API ready.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:14:39.625176096Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T02:14:39.625176096Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-6uyi","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:14:39.711874274Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Composed public SecureStack-owned RplStack with fail-closed OSCORE CoAP routing, RFC 6554 exact-host source routes, routed response ACKs, durable sender preflight, monotonic route time, direct-neighbor link-local scope, and public compatibility coverage. Verified lichen-node 211 unit + integration/doc tests, lichen-oscore 51 unit + 10 vectors/doc test, no-default checks, Clippy -D warnings, and three independent review loops.
